title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0423
summary: 1 This case was brought here under § 1254(1) of Title 28 of the United States Code, 28 U.S.C.A. § 1254(1) to review the dismissal by the Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia of an appeal from the denial of a motion for a new trial on the ground of evidence discovered after the petitioner...
